title: selaginella mollis
intro: Selaginella mollis, also known as the silky spike moss or silky spike club moss, is a species of spore-producing plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. Traditionally, Selaginella mollis has been used in herbal medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella mollis include its ability to help reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Selaginella mollis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or capsules, and its extracts have also been used in traditional Chinese medicine.
